parts.text: Hi, I have a wheat field at latitude 19.5 and longitude 75.3, field size is 2.5ha, planted on 2026-05-10.

To keep your crop healthy, apply 119,163 liters on June 27th and 8,838 liters on June 28th. No additional irrigation is needed from June 29th through July 3rd thanks to rainfall. By following this schedule, you have saved 922,000 liters of water—an 87.8% reduction compared to standard watering practices.

Advisory: This recommendation supplements, does not replace, local agricultural extension advice.

Hi, I have a wheat field at latitude 10.0 and longitude 20.0, field size is 3.0ha, planted on 2026-05-10.

To keep your crop healthy, please irrigate daily from June 27th to July 2nd with the following amounts: 92,895L, 131,205L, 160,050L, 111,315L, 44,370L, and 76,170L respectively. No irrigation is needed on July 3rd due to rainfall. By following this precise schedule, you will save 644,100 liters of water—a 51.1% improvement over a standard watering routine.
